Name: Setting Info
Description: Global scene and rendering configuration parameters for environmental lighting, background color, and dynamic light collection used in post-processing and scene evaluation.

Fields.Name: Background Color Data
Fields.Description: RGBA color used as the base background color for the scene or sky fallback in rendering.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Enable Auto Compute
Fields.Description: Enables automatic gathering and evaluation of scene lights for post-processing and global illumination setup.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Base Distance
Fields.Description: Base radius used to determine which lights are included in the light collection system.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Distance Scaler
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied to light collection distance thresholds to expand or reduce light influence range.

Fields.Name: Light Collection: Maximum Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which lights are considered for inclusion in scene lighting calculations.

Fields.Name: Reflect Scene: Assign Dynamic Light
Fields.Description: Enables dynamic lights to be included in reflection rendering for more accurate reflective surfaces.
